name: webdesigner
description: Modern web and app design orchestration with Nightglass UI, conditional Animate UI, Three.js, Mint, and Blender workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Modern web, app, and optional 3D design workflows
interface.longDescription: Coordinate planning, Nightglass design, conditional animated React UI, implementation, review, security, deployment, and explicitly requested Three.js or Blender work.
defaultPrompt: Design and build a polished product interface.
Create a modern responsive landing page.
